summary: Iteration 22 - Testing 6 Major Stages Complete. 17/17 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: IPL-only matches (8 total), real team logos in ticker/cards/points table, 5-tab MatchDetailPage (Contests, Live, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy Pts), template deadline badges (OPEN/LOCKED), ball-by-ball Live tab, Player Profile Modal with career stats.

minor.issue: One template (full_match) has 15 questions, exceeds max 11 rule

issues: Stats field names showing as 'batting'/'bowling' instead of specific stat names like 'Runs', 'Average', 'Wickets' - the 'fn' field from API not displaying correctly

action_items: MINOR: Fix template with 15 questions (template_id: 65255a84-8ecd-4918-8180-d3d37f54d5f0) - should have max 11 questions
MINOR: Player Profile Modal stats field names showing as 'batting'/'bowling' instead of specific stat names - check 'fn' field mapping from CricketData API
critical_code_review_comments: match_engine.py: Deadline enforcement logic correctly implements hard rules (Full match→Inn1 Ov12, PP→Ov5, Death→Ov14.6)
matches.py: template-deadlines and ball-by-ball endpoints working correctly
admin.py: auto-contests-24h and apply-default-templates endpoints exist and require admin auth
contests.py: Deadline enforcement in submit_predictions correctly checks template deadlines
teams.js: All 10 IPL team logos defined with CricketData API URLs
HomePage.jsx: Real team logos displayed in ticker, points table, and match cards
MatchDetailPage.jsx: 5 tabs implemented, deadline badges showing OPEN/LOCKED status, Player Profile Modal working
seed_data_creation: None - using existing matches and templates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested all 6 major stages. Key findings: (1) IPL cleanup complete - only 8 IPL matches visible, (2) Deadline enforcement working - Full match=Inn1 Ov12, PP=Ov5, Death=Ov14.6, (3) One template exceeds 11 question limit (15 questions), (4) 5-tab MatchDetailPage working with Live tab for ball-by-ball, (5) Player Profile Modal opens from Squad/Fantasy tabs, (6) Real team logos from CricketData API displayed throughout. Use KKR vs MI match (id: e06a8963-410c-4901-bb96-807a3f258fe3) for testing completed match features with squad/fantasy data.

features_verified.stage1_ipl_cleanup: VERIFIED - Only IPL matches (8 total), real team logos in ticker/cards/points table
features_verified.stage2_deadline_enforcement: VERIFIED - Full match=Inn1 Ov12, PP=Ov5, Death=Ov14.6 rules implemented
features_verified.stage3_template_rules: PARTIALLY VERIFIED - Default template fallback endpoint exists, but one template exceeds 11 question limit
features_verified.stage4_auto_contests: VERIFIED - Auto-contests endpoint exists, matches have contests
features_verified.stage5_points_leaderboard: VERIFIED - Fantasy points and leaderboard endpoints working
features_verified.stage6_bbb_player_profile: VERIFIED - Ball-by-ball endpoint working, Player Profile Modal shows career stats
